prompt: Replace all instances of “Lifestyle” in the “Segments Reached” with “Tech Enthusiasts”.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. In the table within image 1, locate the row labeled 'Segments Reached'. For the cells under the 'Blogs', 'Forums', 'Video', and 'Social Media' columns in this row, replace every instance of the word 'Lifestyle' with 'Tech Enthusiasts'. Ensure that any other text already present in these cells (e.g., 'Civil', 'Students', 'Sports') remains unchanged and is correctly separated by commas.
objects: Table cell containing "Tech Enthusiasts, Civil, Students" in the 'Blogs' column of the 'Segments Reached' row
Table cell containing "Tech Enthusiasts, Civil, Sports" in the 'Forums' column of the 'Segments Reached' row
Table cell containing "Tech Enthusiasts, Civil, Sports" in the 'Video' column of the 'Segments Reached' row
Table cell containing "Tech Enthusiasts, Civil, Students" in the 'Social Media' column of the 'Segments Reached' row
